goal: Build consistent full-body strength while keeping cardio and mobility balanced.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Use a weight that leaves 2 reps in reserve.

exercises.name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Keep the back flat and pull elbow toward ribs.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Keep chest tall and knees tracking over toes.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at the hips and keep dumbbells close to legs.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.notes: Step back softly and control the descent.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.notes: Keep ribs down and glutes lightly squeezed.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Move slowly and keep lower back gently pressed down.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Drive through the floor and stand tall.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.notes: Use an incline if needed to keep form clean.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Row
exercises.notes: Pause briefly with shoulder blades squeezed.

exercises.name: Interval Walk Or Bike
exercises.notes: Hard intervals should feel challenging but controlled.

exercises.name: Farmer Carry
exercises.notes: Walk tall with shoulders down and core braced.

exercises.name: Yoga Flow
exercises.notes: Move slowly through comfortable ranges of motion.

exercises.name: Light Core Circuit
exercises.notes: Choose bird dogs, side planks, and glute bridges.
